title: Warehouse Operations Assistant (Full-Time)
description:
Warehouse Assistant (FULL-TIME)

Job Description
We are seeking a reliable, proactive Full-Time Warehouse Assistant to support our daily warehouse operations. This role is ideal for individuals who enjoy hands-on work and are keen to grow in a logistics or warehouse environment.

Job Responsibilities:

  • Responsible for monitoring material transported and delivered for timeliness and legality.
  • Assist in loading/unloading, sorting, and stocking, and packaging goods and orders.
  • Responsible for the review, verification, and reconciliation of shipping documents.
  • Provide support in completing paperwork and documentation.
  • Carry out clerical work, including typing, proofreading, and editing documents, correspondence, and reports for the logistics department or assigned.
  • Responsible for preparing shipping documents such as Commercial Invoice, Packing Lists, and Shipyard Material Receivers, etc., for ongoing shipments and projects.
  • Responsible for entering data into spreadsheets from multiple sources, as well as verifying input and calculations.
  • Provide support in the maintenance of electronic filing system for administrative documentation that guarantees swift retrieval of requested documents.
  • Perform refurnish procedure on retrieve goods from the field.
  • Keep a clean and safe working environment and optimize space utilization.
  • Perform inventory controls and keep quality standards high for audits.
  • Collect and send paperwork to appropriate department.
  • Communicate and cooperate with supervisors and co-workers.
  • Dispose of unserviceable or damaged items.
  • Must be physical fit to carry up to 25 kg.
  • No experience welcome and retirees are welcome.
  • Able to communicate confidently with a diverse group of people in English.
  • Maintain a positive attitude and focus on merchant satisfaction in a fast-paced environment.

Job Details

  • Employment Type: Full-Time

  • Working Hours: Monday to Friday 9am to 6pm

  • Start Date: Immediate or earliest availability.

postedCompany.description:
Cube Payment Services Pte Ltd (CubePay) is a privately held Singapore-headquartered digital payment financial technology company.

Since our founding in 2014, CubePay has been a trusted partner in Singapore’s digital payment ecosystem. We have forged long-standing partnerships with leading payment technology companies, networks, processors, acquirers, merchants, and we are a member of the Singapore FinTech Association (SFA). Today, we manage over 8,000 merchants across 30,000 retail points of presence in our network.

Our robust RadiumOne Merchant Payment Platform simplifies payment. It provides uncompromising mission-critical applications that enhance merchants’ payment acceptance, security, and productivity. Additionally, we lend our expertise in providing enterprise payment technology consulting, customised end-to-end payment solution design, deployment, and round-the-clock technical support.

​CubePay conforms to the highly demanding cybersecurity and regulatory standards, from data security to privacy and corporate governance. We are certified by the Payment Card Industry’s Data Security Standard (PCI-DSS) and Workplace Safety and Health Council’s bizSAFE-4. CubePay's RadiumOne Merchant Payment Platform is certified by SFA.
postedCompany.name: CUBE PAYMENT SERVICES PTE. LTD.
